title: Pseudobarleria richardiana
taxonomy: Pseudobarleria richardiana is classified as a species within the family Acanthaceae. This family is commonly known as the acanthus or thorny flower family. Acanthaceae is a large family of flowering plants that includes about 2,964 species in 320 genera. The genus Pseudobarleria is a part of the tribe Rupestres, which is a group of flowering plants found mainly in tropical Africa. Pseudobarleria richardiana is a plant species native to Madagascar.
